title: Medium Collision Studies
description: Four independent studies where a different flat 2D mark system collides with one photoreal 3D object through shadows, occlusion, refraction, or weight.
creative_direction: Each single image changes the drawing medium and real object relationship, proving the theme beyond one character: chalk, ink, collage, and blueprint marks must stay visibly flat while the object behaves like a photographed volume.

en.title: Medium Collision Studies
en.description: Four independent studies where a different flat 2D mark system collides with one photoreal 3D object through shadows, occlusion, refraction, or weight.

zh-CN.title: 媒介碰撞单图研究
zh-CN.description: 四张独立单图,用粉笔、墨线、拼贴和蓝图线条测试二维痕迹与真实三维物体的碰撞。
